reference: I struck the front lower part of my leg right on the bone against a chunk of ice. There was barely any bruising, which is really odd for me, as I bruise very easily. It has been over a week since the incident, and there is still a hard lump where I hit it. It hurts slightly when I press on it. The lump is very noticeable when I run my fingers over it. Additionally, today I hit my leg again in the same spot while breaking up a dog fight, and it really hurt for a while afterward. Should I go see my doctor?
